title: Infosys step-down subsidiaries in Romania approve internal merger
detailed_summary: Infosys disclosed that, as part of internal restructuring, shareholders approved the merger of in-tech Engineering services S.R.L Romania with ProIT S.R.L.RO Romania. Both entities are step-down wholly owned subsidiaries of Infosys Limited through in-tech GmbH. The merger involves no cash consideration and does not change Infosys Limited’s shareholding pattern.

key_facts.fact: The merger of in-tech Engineering services S.R.L Romania with ProIT S.R.L.RO Romania was approved by the shareholders of the respective entities.
Both the transferor company and transferee company are step-down wholly owned subsidiaries of Infosys Limited.
The stated rationale for the merger is to enable synergies of operations and rationalize and consolidate the group structure.

corporate_actions.description: Internal restructuring merger of in-tech Engineering services S.R.L Romania, the transferor company, with ProIT S.R.L.RO Romania, the transferee company.
corporate_actions.amount_or_ratio: There is no cash consideration involved under the scheme of merger.

important_text_spans.text: as a part of internal restructuring, merger of in-tech Engineering services S.R.L Romania ('Infosys Romania') with ProIT S.R.L.RO Romania ('ProIT'), wholly owned step-down subsidiaries of the Company has been approved by the shareholders of respective entities.
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the main disclosure that the event is an internal merger of Infosys step-down subsidiaries.

important_text_spans.text: There is no cash consideration involved under the scheme of merger.
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the absence of transaction consideration.

processing_notes: Marked non-material because the document describes an internal merger between wholly owned step-down subsidiaries, with no cash consideration and no change in Infosys Limited shareholding pattern.
